nutrition_approval.detail: Sign-off required for: (1) the 6 A-ceiling-withheld macro-A white cheeses (confirm withhold is correct, or that any clean live-culture SKU may publish A); (2) cottage (all B, median 76.6), white/labaneh (B/C), cream-cheese (median 60.7 C-heavy) grades on the now-correctly-routed set; (3) acceptance that EV-015 credit is sparse (3/57) by data.

verdict: READY pending Nutrition sign-off — engine registered, router fix governed + regression-locked (EV-025, 15/15), constructs evidence-grounded, observability + rollback in place, A-ceiling correctly withholds 6 macro-A's. All DATA + ROUTING + QA gates PASS. The only gate to live promotion is the Nutrition/Product human sign-off.
